examples: Examples of this construction include poplin, faille, bengaline and ottoman.
The "Afternoon Dress" by Paul Poiret, is a navy and red-block printed silk faille dress from 1923.
Phillips, 30, who is 13th in line to the throne but does not use a royal title, married Tindall, 32, in an ivory silk faille and silk duchess satin gown designed by Stewart Parvin.
Especially stunning was the black silk faille and ivory swansdown dress on Andreea Diaconu (above).
The show was like walking into a garden of organza peonys, crepe-de-chine azaleas and ivory silk faille trimmings.
